items.title: After adding Dean Wade and Ariel Hukporti, I've got the Philadelphia 76ers about $13.2M under their first-apron hard cap (triggered by using Non-Taxpayer MLE for Wade/Hukporti).
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
After adding Dean Wade and Ariel Hukporti, I've got the Philadelphia 76ers about $13.2M under their first-apron hard cap (triggered by using Non-Taxpayer MLE for Wade/Hukporti).

Two open standard roster spots for the Sixers. Kelly Oubre Jr still a free agent.

items.title: Ariel Hukporti is getting some of what's left of the Non-Taxpayer MLE (most went to Dean Wade) from the Philadelphia 76ers.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Ariel Hukporti is getting some of what's left of the Non-Taxpayer MLE (most went to Dean Wade) from the Philadelphia 76ers.

May take a return for Andre Drummond to the Sixers out of the mix.

items.title: Dean Wade will go into the Sixers non-taxpayer mid-level exception. They're now $16.6 million below the first apron hard cap.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Dean Wade will go into the Sixers non-taxpayer mid-level exception. They're now $16.6 million below the first apron hard cap.

They have about $6 million remaining of their MLE, but using it would push them up against the luxury tax line.

items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Dean Wade's contract will come out of the Non-Taxpayer MLE for the Philadelphia 76ers.

They'll now be hard-capped at the first apron. Sixers have roughly $13.8M in space under the first apron with two open standard roster spots.
